raw_consumer_statement: I had my credit card in my wallet. I logged into my Barclays app and see pending charges from.XXXX  XXXX  on XXXX XXXX and XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX  a hookah store I am XXXX and never smoke for XXXX XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XX/XX/year> {$200.00} XXXX  XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX  XX/XX/year> XXXX Barclays remove the charges and land an investigation. Today all money was charged to my card and I contacted the company. Barclays informed me they did an investigation and the charges found valid because a cars was used. I am very shocked because I never been to any of theses locations and never made the purchases.
